data.body: Honestly, eating plenty of protein and being on drugs that work on norepinephrine and dopamine rather than serotonin has been an absolute boon for me. Protein helps the body actually make dopamine and other neurotransmitters, the drugs then regulate and modulate its release. (Exercise helps too!)
